notes: Processes silicate and oxide raw materials into advanced ceramics, semiconductor materials, and megastructure mass.
throughput_mult scales how quickly a batch completes relative to the recipe's base build_time_s.
efficiency is the fraction of listed input materials consumed per batch; values below 1.0 represent material savings from process optimization.
All refineries in this family can process all lithic recipes in-domain from tech 1 onward.
max_concurrent_recipes is the number of recipe slots that can run in parallel.
Draws electric_mw from the ship or base power bus at all times the facility is active.
Usable at any location — orbital, surface, or microgravity habitat. No gravity requirement.
